entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A highly cross-pollinated cereal crop (Pennisetum glaucum) studied for genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation of genetic characteristics within and between populations of pearl millet

entities.name: LANDRACE ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Local varieties of pearl millet used to establish a core subset for study

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The organization maintaining the global pearl millet germplasm collection

entities.name: RANDOM PROPORTIONAL SAMPLING STRATEGY
entities.description: A sampling approach used to select a minimum core subset of accessions

entities.name: STRATIFICATION
entities.description: The process of dividing the landrace collection based on geographic origin and traits

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC ORIGIN
entities.description: The physical location from which the landrace accessions were collected

entities.name: MORPHO-AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Physical and agricultural characteristics used for stratification of accessions

entities.name: RFLP PROBES
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism probes used to quantify genetic diversity and detect polymorphism

entities.name: RESTRICTION ENZYMES
entities.description: Enzymes including EcoRI, EcoRV, HindIII, and DraI used to cut DNA for RFLP analysis

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Genomic regions associated with specific traits like disease resistance and drought tolerance

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: A trait associated with nine of the RFLP probes via QTLs

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: A trait associated with five of the RFLP probes via QTLs

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Different forms of a gene detected using probe-enzyme combinations

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF MOLECULAR VARIANCE
entities.description: AMOVA used to partition variance components for diversity analysis

entities.name: DENDROGRAM
entities.description: A tree-like diagram used to cluster plants based on genetic dissimilarity

entities.name: DISSIMILARITY MATRIX
entities.description: A matrix used to calculate the distance between accessions for clustering

entities.name: WARD'S ALGORITHM
entities.description: A clustering algorithm used to generate the dendrogram

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The presence of genetic variation detected by RFLP markers
